name: Country Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 2-inch cubes.
2. Finely chop the garlic.
3. Cut the red and green peppers into 2-inch cubes.
4. Thinly slice the onion and mushrooms.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
6. Add the chicken, sausage, and garlic to the skillet. Cook for 10 minutes.
7. Remove the pan from the heat.
8. Cut the sausage into 1-inch pieces and remove all ingredients from the pan. Drain.
9. Add the remaining oil to the skillet.
10. Add the peppers, onion, and mushrooms to the skillet. Saute for 5 minutes or until tender.
11. Add the tomatoes and their liquid to the skillet, breaking up the tomatoes with a spoon.
12. Return the chicken and sausage to the pan. Cover and cook for 5 minutes, or until cooked through.
13. Serve with lemon-orzo pilaf.
Per serving: 260 calories, 27g protein, 11g fat, 14g carbohydrates, 616mg sodium, 69mg cholesterol.
